title: CVE-2018-25199 OOP CMS BLOG 1.0 SQL Injection via search parameter

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2018-25199 OOP CMS BLOG 1.0 SQL Injection via search par
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/07
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*page.php*'
            - '*posts.php*'
            - '*search.php*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
